title: atraphaxis atraphaxiformis
intro: Atraphaxis atraphaxiformis, also known as Chinese wolf's bane or Russian wolf's bane, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Polygonaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Atraphaxis atraphaxiformis include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its dried roots and leaves are also used in traditional Chinese medicine.
